markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO and content marketing collaboration between GrowthX and Goodcall.ai](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Goodcall has seen success with programmatic SEO for area codes, shifting their target market upwards](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed a two-pronged approach: programmatic content creation ($9k/mo) and AI-powered link building outreach ($6k/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Bob expressed interest but cited short-term cash constraints; Marcel offered flexible options including monthly billing and a referral program](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to schedule a follow-up meeting on January 13th to finalize details and potentially kick off the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)

## Topics

### Goodcall's Business Evolution

  - [Initially targeted SMBs with a freemium model, onboarding 30,000 businesses at $1.50 each via TikTok ads](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Shifted strategy due to lack of viral growth, moving upmarket to larger clients](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Now serving enterprise clients like Night Swift (largest US trucking company) and Haircuttery (520 locations, 7,000 calls/day)](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Average Contract Value (ACV) increased from $2,000 to $180,000](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### SEO Strategy and Results

  - [Implemented programmatic SEO for area codes and business applications](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - Ranking \#1 or \#2 for "AI phone agent" as of the previous day
  - [Attracting larger clients through organic search, including a $10 billion trucking company](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Approach

  - [Comprehensive keyword research and clustering (analyzed over 110,000 keywords for a recent client)](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Custom AI-powered content creation workflows with human editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)
  - [Programmatic content generation at scale (e.g., 12,000 pages/year for $75k/month for another client)](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [AI-driven outbound link building campaign](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [GrowthX uses GPT-4 and other advanced AI models for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Bob suggested using Microsoft Azure for inference to reduce compute costs](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
  - [Marcel mentioned GrowthX is moving away from Airtable to custom-coded solutions for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=2593.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [GrowthX proposed $9k/month for programmatic content and $6k/month for link building](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Discussed potential for monthly billing and a referral program to offset costs](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3326.0)
  - [Considered starting with just programmatic content to manage budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3032.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send updated Statement of Work (SOW) with flexible options](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [Schedule kick-off meeting for January 13th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3427.0)
  - [GrowthX team to begin preliminary strategy work before the official kick-off](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3440.0)
  - [Bob to consider referral opportunities within the Neo portfolio of companies](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3280.0)
  - [Both parties to continue communication via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/zGDy76zZAmPpfZYnRKVu6ekWaz8KYCR6?tab=summary&timestamp=3434.0)
